name: HWR_XP_SKILLS_B
description: This table will be used to store discovered skills from the experience store.

columns.Name: USER_ID
columns.Comments: This represents the Fusion id of the user for which this skill was found.

columns.Name: SKILL_ID
columns.Comments: This is the unique identifier for the corresponding skill.

columns.Name: VERB_ID
columns.Comments: This is the unique identifier for the corresponding verb.

columns.Name: SCORE
columns.Comments: SCORE Normalized claculation of the relevance score of skill.

columns.Name: RAW_SCORE
columns.Comments: RAW_SCORE Raw calculation of the relevance score of skill.

columns.Name: IS_SEEDED
columns.Comments: This indicates whether the skill was seeded or not seeded.

columns.Name: XP_SKILLS_ATTR_1
columns.Comments: XP_SKILLS_ATTR_1. This is the extra attribute in case if needed.

columns.Name: XP_SKILLS_ATTR_2
columns.Comments: XP_SKILLS_ATTR_2. This is the extra attribute in case if needed.

columns.Name: XP_SKILLS_ATTR_3
columns.Comments: XP_SKILLS_ATTR_3. This is the extra attribute in case if needed.

columns.Name: XP_SKILLS_ATTR_4
columns.Comments: XP_SKILLS_ATTR_4. This is the extra attribute in case if needed.

columns.Name: CREATION_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the creation of the row.

columns.Name: CREATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who created the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the last update of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the session login associated to the user who last updated the row.
